if (!items.length) { downloadsList.innerHTML = '
No trophies captured yet. Download a file and Kayock will track progress, speed, ETA, retry, pause, and resume.
'; return; }

function formatBytes(bytes) { if (!bytes) return '0 B'; const units = ['B','KB','MB','GB','TB']; let n = bytes, i = 0; while (n >= 1024 && i < units.length - 1) { n /= 1024; i++; } return `${n.toFixed(i ? 1 : 0)} ${units[i]}`; }
function getSecurityEvents() { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('kayockSecurityEvents') || '[]'); } catch { return []; } }

if (!items.length) { securityEvents.innerHTML = '
No blocked permission requests yet.
'; return; }
function getDiagnostics() { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('kayockDiagnostics') || '[]'); } catch { return []; } }
function saveDiagnostics(items) { localStorage.setItem('kayockDiagnostics', JSON.stringify(items.slice(0, 80))); renderDiagnostics(); updateJournal(); }

if (!items.length) { diagnosticsList.innerHTML = '
No diagnostic events yet. That is good.
'; return; }
const tab = activeTab(); const url = tab?.url || 'kayock://home'; const host = getHost(url); const s = getShield(); const allowed = shouldAllowJavascript(url);
if (shieldAdvice) shieldAdvice.textContent = isInternal(url) ? 'Kayock page safe' : (allowed ? 'Fed / scripts allowed' : 'Starved / scripts blocked');

trustedList.innerHTML = trusted.length ? trusted.map(h => `
${escapeHtml(h)}
`).join('') : '
No trusted sites yet.
';

trustedList.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(btn => btn.addEventListener('click', () => { const sh = getShield(); sh.trustedSites = (sh.trustedSites || []).filter(x => x !== btn.dataset.host); saveShield(sh); reloadCurrentWithShield(); }));
const tab = activeTab(); if (!tab || isInternal(tab.url)) return; const host = getHost(tab.url); const s = getShield();

s.trustedSites = [...new Set([...(s.trustedSites || []), host])]; s.blockedSites = (s.blockedSites || []).filter(h => h !== host); allowOnceSites.delete(host); saveShield(s); reloadCurrentWithShield();
const tab = activeTab(); if (!tab || isInternal(tab.url)) return; const host = getHost(tab.url); const s = getShield();

s.blockedSites = [...new Set([...(s.blockedSites || []), host])]; s.trustedSites = (s.trustedSites || []).filter(h => h !== host); allowOnceSites.delete(host); saveShield(s); reloadCurrentWithShield();
const tab = activeTab(); if (!tab || isInternal(tab.url)) return; const host = getHost(tab.url); const s = getShield();
addDiagnostic({ type: 'allow-once-added', message: `Temporary trust added for this session: ${host}` });
addDiagnostic({ type: 'temporary-trust-cleared', message: `Cleared ${count} Allow Once site(s) during ${reason}.` });
const dz = document.getElementById('defaultZoom'); if (dz) dz.value = String(s.defaultZoom || 1);
const uiSize = document.getElementById('uiSize'); if (uiSize) uiSize.value = s.uiSize || 'large';
const uiFont = document.getElementById('uiFont'); if (uiFont) uiFont.value = s.uiFont || 'legible';
const spellcheckUS = document.getElementById('spellcheckUS'); if (spellcheckUS) spellcheckUS.checked = s.spellcheckUS !== false;
const folder = document.getElementById('downloadFolder'); if (folder) folder.textContent = s.downloadFolder || 'Default Windows Downloads folder';
const s = getSettings(); s.downloadFolder = folder; saveSettingsObject(s);
const vault = { app: 'Kayock Browser', version: '2.5.1-rc.1', exportedAt: new Date().toISOString(), data: {} };
for (const key of keys) vault.data[key] = localStorage.getItem(key);
const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(vault, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });
showSettingsMessage('Vault exported. Keep that file safe.');
if (!vault || !vault.data) throw new Error('Not a Kayock Vault file');
renderBookmarks(); renderHistory(); renderTracks(); renderDownloads(); renderShieldPanel(); renderDiagnostics(); updateCampfire();
showSettingsMessage('Vault imported. Restart Kayock to restore saved tabs.');
showSettingsMessage('Import failed: not a valid Kayock Vault file.');
const ok = confirm('Privacy Reset clears Marks, Tracks, Trophies, sessions, Shield trust decisions, and events on this copy of Kayock. Continue?');
renderBookmarks(); renderHistory(); renderTracks(); renderDownloads(); renderShieldPanel(); renderDiagnostics(); updateCampfire();
showSettingsMessage('Privacy Reset complete. Restart Kayock for a clean session.');
showHunterToast(pinned ? 'Hunter Panel pinned open' : 'Hunter Panel set to icon rail', 'Sidebar');
shieldMode.addEventListener('change', () => { const s = getShield(); s.mode = shieldMode.value; saveShield(s); reloadCurrentWithShield(); });
// v1.0 Daily Driver Alpha panel behavior: visible X buttons, ESC to close, and click outside to dismiss.
// Eagle Eye: attempt Ctrl + mouse wheel zoom when the wheel event reaches the shell.
// 2.5.1 performance pass: show the browser first, then warm up panels quietly.
title Kayock Browser 2.5.1 RC - Foundation Launcher
echo   Kayock Browser 2.5.1 RC - Foundation Release
echo ERROR: Node.js was not found.
echo Please install Node.js LTS from:
echo After installing Node.js, close this window and double-click RUN_KAYOCK.bat again.
echo ERROR: npm was not found, even though Node may be installed.
echo Please reinstall Node.js LTS and make sure Add to PATH is enabled.
echo ERROR: package.json was not found in this folder.
echo Make sure you extracted the ZIP completely before running Kayock.
echo Using public npm registry for this folder...
call npm config set registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ >nul 2>nul
echo Installing Kayock dependencies. This can take a few minutes the first time...
echo First install attempt failed. Trying Electron repair install...
echo ERROR: npm install failed. Copy this window text and send it with your bug report.
echo If Kayock closes immediately, copy any error text from this window.
echo ERROR: Kayock closed with an error. Copy this window text and send it with your bug report.
body { margin:0; height:100vh; background:var(--bg); color:#f6dfb1; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; overflow:hidden; }
.topbar { height:70px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:10px 6px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); background:linear-gradient(90deg,#080507,#13080b); }
.eyeLogo { width:50px; height:50px; border:2px solid var(--gold); border-radius:50%; object-fit:cover; box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(192,24,38,.65); }
button { background:#10090b; color:#f7d989; border:1px solid #6d471a; border-radius:12px; padding:10px 14px; font-weight:bold; cursor:pointer; }
#address { flex:1; background:#050405; color:#fff0bf; border:1px solid #6d471a; border-radius:18px; padding:0 16px; outline:none; font-size:14px; }
.tabsBar { height:42px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:5px 8px; background:#0b0607; border-bottom:1px solid #24120d; }
.tab { max-width:220px; min-width:120px; padding:6px 8px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; gap:8px; border-radius:10px 10px 3px 3px; opacity:.75; }
.home { position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:18px; text-align:center; z-index:2; }
.homeLogo { width:156px; height:156px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:50%; border:2px solid var(--gold); box-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(192,24,38,.45); }
h1 { font-size:64px; margin:0; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:8px; color:var(--gold2); }
.homeSearch input { flex:1; background:#080607; color:#f8dfaf; border:1px solid #6d471a; border-radius:18px; padding:13px 16px; outline:none; }

.sidePanel { position:absolute; right:18px; top:118px; width:350px; max-height:calc(100vh - 140px); overflow:auto; z-index:10; padding:18px; background:rgba(9,5,7,.97); border:1px solid var(--gold); box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,.7); border-radius:16px; }
.permission { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; border-bottom:1px solid #2c1710; padding:10px 0; gap:10px; }
.bookmarkItem { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr auto; gap:8px; align-items:center; border:1px solid #2c1710; border-radius:10px; padding:8px; background:#12080a; }
from { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 4px rgba(209, 35, 35, .35)); transform: scale(1); }
to { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(255, 40, 40, .9)); transform: scale(1.04); }
small { color: #9c8360; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0; text-transform: none; }
/* Kayock 2.1 Alpha — Eagle Eye accessibility comfort layer */
/* Kayock 2.1.1 — Eagle Eye Stability accessibility enforcement */
/* Kayock 2.1.2 — Eagle Eye Stability final accessibility enforcement */
body[data-ui-size='extra'] button, body[data-ui-size='extra'] input, body[data-ui-size='extra'] select { font-size: 20px !important; }
body[data-ui-size='large'] button, body[data-ui-size='large'] input, body[data-ui-size='large'] select { font-size: 17px !important; }
/* Kayock 2.2 — Eagle Eye Spellcheck + live Reading Comfort */
body[data-ui-font='verdana'] select, body[data-ui-font='verdana'] textarea { font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif !important; }
body[data-ui-font='dyslexic'] select, body[data-ui-font='dyslexic'] textarea { font-family: 'Comic Sans MS', Verdana, Arial, sans-serif !important; letter-spacing: .02em; }
body[data-ui-size='extra'] .toolbar button, body[data-ui-size='extra'] .toolbar input, body[data-ui-size='extra'] .toolbar select { min-height: 42px; }
.brandText { overflow: hidden; transition: max-width .16s ease, opacity .16s ease; max-width: 150px; }
/* Kayock 2.4: icon-first Hunter rail. Default is compact; hover slides out as an overlay. */
.zoomControls { display: flex; gap: 3px; align-items: center; border: 1px solid #3d2112; border-radius: 14px; padding: 3px; background: #080506; }
transition: opacity .14s ease, max-height .18s ease, padding .18s ease, margin .18s ease;
.campLabel { color: #c88943; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; white-space: nowrap; }
.campfire strong { color: #ffdf8b; display: block; margin-top: 4px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.hunterNav span { opacity: 0; max-width: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: opacity .12s ease, max-width .16s ease; }
.hunterPanel:hover .hunterNav span, body.hunterPinned .hunterNav span, body.draggingTab .hunterNav span { opacity: 1; max-width: 150px; }
.trackCreateBox { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 8px; margin: 12px 0; }
background:#050405; color:#fff0bf; border:1px solid #6d471a; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px; outline:none;
transition: border-color .12s ease, box-shadow .12s ease, transform .12s ease;
.trackMain strong { color: #ffdf8b; display: block; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
.trackMain span { display: block; color: #b98240; font-size: 12px; margin-top: 3px; }
"scope": "isolated temporary FOXAI tree; no user live files changed",
"result": "Preview and Apply commands completed successfully against a disposable Git-backed simulation tree."
if not exist "%PYTHON%" echo ERROR: Portable Python is missing.& pause & exit /b 2
if not exist "%MANAGER%" echo ERROR: ComfyUI normal controller is missing.& pause & exit /b 3
echo Approved Custom Nodes CPU lifecycle ended cleanly.
echo Approved Custom Nodes CPU lifecycle stopped with code %RC%.
if not exist "%PYTHON%" echo ERROR: Portable Python is missing.& pause & exit /b 2
if not exist "%MANAGER%" echo ERROR: ComfyUI normal controller is missing.& pause & exit /b 3
echo ComfyUI normal lifecycle ended cleanly.
echo ComfyUI normal lifecycle stopped with code %RC%.
